name: Advent — Waiting for the Light
description: Four weeks of hope, longing, and quiet preparation for the coming of Christ. Mix ancient antiphons with fresh prayers for the season of expectant waiting.

prayers.title: Light the candle of Hope
prayers.description: Pause at the first candle of Advent. Ask God to rekindle hope in every place it has grown dim — in your home, your nation, and your own heart.

prayers.title: Light the candle of Peace
prayers.description: Ask the Prince of Peace to still what is anxious within you, and to send His peace into a world straining for good news.

prayers.title: Light the candle of Joy
prayers.description: Ask God for joy that does not depend on circumstance — the deep, settled joy of knowing Christ has come and is coming again.

prayers.title: Light the candle of Love
prayers.description: Thank God that His love took on flesh. Ask Him to let His love flow through you to the people who will cross your path today.

prayers.title: A prayer for waiting well
prayers.description: Sit in the quiet of Advent. Tell God what you are waiting for, and ask Him to teach you the slow, trusting patience of Mary and Simeon.

prayers.title: Prepare the way of the Lord
prayers.description: Pray through John the Baptist's cry: where does your heart need smoothing, lowering, or lifting to receive Christ more fully?

prayers.title: Mary's Magnificat
prayers.description: Pray Luke 1:46-55 slowly as your own song. Ask God to magnify Himself in the small, hidden details of your life.

prayers.title: O Sapientia — O Wisdom
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 17. 'O Wisdom, coming from the mouth of the Most High, reaching from one end to the other, mightily and sweetly ordering all things — come and teach us the way of prudence.'

prayers.title: O Adonai — O Lord of Israel
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 18. 'O Adonai, Leader of Israel, You appeared to Moses in the fire of the burning bush and gave him the Law on Sinai — come and redeem us with an outstretched arm.'

prayers.title: O Radix Jesse — O Root of Jesse
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 19. 'O Root of Jesse, standing as a sign among the peoples — come and save us, and do not delay.'

prayers.title: O Clavis David — O Key of David
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 20. 'O Key of David, and Scepter of the house of Israel — come and lead the prisoner from the dungeon, and those who sit in darkness and the shadow of death.'

prayers.title: O Oriens — O Dayspring
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 21. 'O Dayspring, Brightness of the everlasting light, Sun of justice — come and enlighten those who sit in darkness and in the shadow of death.'

prayers.title: O Rex Gentium — O King of the Nations
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 22. 'O King of the Nations, the desired of all peoples, the cornerstone that binds all things into one — come and save the creatures You fashioned from dust.'

prayers.title: O Emmanuel — O God With Us
prayers.description: Ancient antiphon for Dec 23. 'O Emmanuel, our King and Lawgiver, the expectation and salvation of the nations — come and save us, O Lord our God.'

prayers.title: Christmas Eve — Pray for the world He came to save
prayers.description: On this holy night, lift up the whole aching world before the Child of Bethlehem. Pray for those who feel forgotten this Christmas.
